subcodes.first_line: O thou who art kindled with the fire of the love of God! Verily, the heart of the world is consumed with the raging flames of separation in this calamity [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای مشتعل بنار محبت الهی قد احترقت کبد العالم باجیج نار احتراق الفراق فی رزیه
subcodes.subjects: @expressions of grief; lamentation; sadness, @call to action, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity
